name: NASCAR Cup Series Championship
comments: Ryan Blaney has won the NASCAR Cup Series Championship Race at Phoenix Raceway, his 17th victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty: No. 16 (backup car).
